purpose: developer-usable semantic crops for UI reconstruction reference
coordinate_system: pixel coordinates in original image space, origin top-left
notes: Semantic regions are tuned per page family and, for backend pages, per page layout.
Dashboard pages 01-05 share one layout model; backend pages 06-08 use page-specific coordinates.
These are raster concept crops for visual/layout reference; rebuild text/icons as native UI in code.

regions.name: 00_full_reference
regions.description: 完整参考图

regions.name: 01_top_title_bar
regions.description: 顶部标题栏：标题、面包屑、时间、健康度、数据来源

regions.name: 02_left_sidebar_full
regions.description: 左侧侧栏完整区域

regions.name: 03_left_panel_top
regions.description: 左侧上方面板：资产/设备/配置主信息

regions.name: 04_left_panel_bottom
regions.description: 左侧下方面板：业务/指标/列表信息

regions.name: 05_main_stage_full
regions.description: 中间主舞台完整区域

regions.name: 06_main_stage_header_zone
regions.description: 主舞台顶部状态标签区

regions.name: 07_main_stage_core_scene
regions.description: 主舞台核心孪生/拓扑/推演画面

regions.name: 08_right_sidebar_full
regions.description: 右侧侧栏完整区域

regions.name: 09_right_panel_top
regions.description: 右侧上方面板：当前告警/推演结果

regions.name: 10_right_panel_bottom
regions.description: 右侧下方面板：影响范围/处理建议/环境状态

regions.name: 11_bottom_bar_full
regions.description: 底部完整区域：时间轴、视图导航、操作按钮

regions.name: 12_bottom_timeline
regions.description: 底部左侧：最近24小时告警时间轴

regions.name: 13_bottom_view_nav
regions.description: 底部中间：当前视图缩略导航/流程

regions.name: 14_bottom_actions
regions.description: 底部右侧：推演/报告/导出等操作按钮

regions.name: 00_full_reference

regions.name: 01_top_title_bar
regions.description: 顶部标题栏：标题、面包屑、时间、模式、状态

regions.name: 02_top_tool_bar
regions.description: 顶部工具栏：撤销、重做、吸附网格、导入、保存、发布

regions.name: 03_left_resource_panel
regions.description: 左侧资源组件库完整区域

regions.name: 04_left_library_top
regions.description: 左侧上方：组件分类与可拖拽资源

regions.name: 05_left_unplaced_assets
regions.description: 左侧中部：未放置资源列表

regions.name: 06_main_editor_canvas
regions.description: 中间机房平面编辑画布完整区域

regions.name: 07_main_canvas_core
regions.description: 中间核心机房布局、机柜排和选中框

regions.name: 08_right_properties_panel
regions.description: 右侧属性配置完整面板

regions.name: 09_right_properties_top
regions.description: 右侧上方：选中对象属性字段

regions.name: 10_right_rules_bottom
regions.description: 右侧下方：开关、应用、复制布局

regions.name: 11_bottom_bar_full
regions.description: 底部完整区域：图层、校验、发布、数据说明

regions.name: 12_bottom_left_status
regions.description: 底部左侧：图层管理

regions.name: 13_bottom_middle_validation
regions.description: 底部中间：校验结果与发布流程

regions.name: 14_bottom_publish_actions
regions.description: 底部右侧：数据说明
